mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.user_id AS userId, d.lab_id AS labId, d.skill_tags AS skillTags, d.study_progress AS reason, d.attachment_url AS attachmentUrl, d.delivery_attempt_count AS deliveryAttemptCount, d.withdraw_count AS withdrawCount, d.delivery_time AS createTime, d.audit_status AS status, d.audit_remark AS comment, d.update_time AS updateTime, d.is_admitted AS isAdmitted, d.admit_time AS admitTime, u.real_name AS studentName, u.student_id AS studentId, u.college, u.major, u.phone, u.email, u.resume AS resumeUrl, l.lab_name AS labName FROM t_delivery d LEFT JOIN t_user u ON d.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_lab l ON d.lab_id = l.id
d.deleted = 0
AND d.lab_id = #{labId}
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND u.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentId}, '%')
AND d.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY d.delivery_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.user_id AS userId, d.lab_id AS labId, d.skill_tags AS skillTags, d.study_progress AS reason, d.attachment_url AS attachmentUrl, d.delivery_attempt_count AS deliveryAttemptCount, d.withdraw_count AS withdrawCount, d.delivery_time AS createTime, d.audit_status AS status, d.audit_remark AS comment, d.update_time AS updateTime, d.is_admitted AS isAdmitted, d.admit_time AS admitTime, u.real_name AS studentName, u.student_id AS studentId, u.resume AS resumeUrl, l.lab_name AS labName FROM t_delivery d LEFT JOIN t_user u ON d.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_lab l ON d.lab_id = l.id
d.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} AND d.is_admitted = 2
ORDER BY d.admit_time DESC, d.audit_time DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_delivery WHERE lab_id = #{labId} AND is_admitted = 1 AND deleted = 0
